paper.title: The Compliance Trap: Diagnosing How AI Agents Consume Conflicting Memory

arxiv_source_archive.result: The immutable source archive contains manuscript, bibliography, style, and figure sources only. It does not contain the MemTrapBench tasks, memory trios, trajectories, per-trace labels, analysis/gate_annotation_results.json named in the paper, result tables, or runnable evaluation code.

release_search.conclusion: No verified author-owned code, MemTrapBench data, task/memory package, trajectory corpus, per-trace annotation file, or result release was located at acquisition. This is an acquisition-time search result, not proof that no release exists or will later appear.

github_api_searches.result: One repository matched, zachysun/DailyArXiv, an indexing surface rather than a paper artifact release.
Twenty-three repositories matched; inspection of the returned leading results found generic phrase matches or paper indexes, not a verified paper artifact release.
Sixty-three noisy numeric matches were returned; none of the leading results was a verified paper artifact release.

release_search.paper_link_inspection: The complete arXiv HTML outbound-link inventory contained 19 unique external links. Apart from arXiv/LaTeXML infrastructure and acknowledgments, the only substantive cited-model URL was the Gemma 4 model page. No repository, dataset, project page, or artifact locator was present.
release_search.public_profile_search_limit: A targeted public GitHub search found a plausible same-name profile, Schuture, but identity was not established solely from the paper. Its 37 owner repositories at acquisition included no repository named for the paper, E-P-R, or MemTrapBench. A second same-name profile was evidently unrelated to the paper's recent research record. Neither profile is treated as author-owned release evidence without a paper-side identity link.

scope_note: This manifest establishes source acquisition, extraction, and release-search provenance only. It does not constitute a deep review or validate memory causality, E-P-R mechanism identification, safety, professional validity, production fitness, or readiness.
version_notice: The arXiv API identifies immutable version 2607.10608v1, submitted and last updated 2026-07-12, and its summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice at acquisition. The complete 25-page PDF and 113,410-character layout-preserving extraction were inspected across the opening, method/results, limitations, references, appendices, and final page. Equations, figures, and table layout should be verified against the PDF or arXiv HTML rather than relying solely on pdftotext output.
